description: Body for catalog-nodes-create. team_id is taken from the URL, not the body.

business_domain.description: Domain this table belongs to ŌĆö e.g. `billing`, `crm`, `product_usage`, `support`. Used to group related tables in discovery and to scope cross-source queries.

confidence.description: Agent's confidence (0..1) in the description and semantic tagging it just wrote. Surfaces as a draft/confirmed indicator and lets review workflows prioritize low-confidence rows.

generator_model.description: Identifier of the model that produced this row when generated by an agent ŌĆö e.g. `claude-opus-4-7`. Leave null when humans author the description. Used for auditing autofill quality over time.

kind.description:
What kind of catalog entry this is. `warehouse_table` for an imported data warehouse table, `saved_query` for a derived view, `system_table` for a built-in PostHog system table like `events` or `persons`, `posthog_table` for other first-party tables.

* `warehouse_table` - warehouse_table
* `saved_query` - saved_query
* `system_table` - system_table
* `posthog_table` - posthog_table

name.description: Stable identifier for the node, unique per (team, kind). For warehouse tables this is the imported table name (e.g. `stripe_charges`). For system tables use the canonical name (e.g. `events`). The agent looks nodes up by name before upserting, so keep this stable across runs.

saved_query_id.description: Set when `kind=saved_query` to bind this node to the backing `DataWarehouseSavedQuery` row. Leave null for non-saved-query kinds.

semantic_role.description: Short tag for the table's role in the business model ŌĆö e.g. `fact`, `dimension`, `bridge`, `event_source`, `identity`. Helps the agent reason about join cardinality and aggregation safety.

synthetic_description.description: Markdown description of what this table contains, when to use it, caveats, and how it relates to other tables. Written by the agent or human. Becomes the primary signal future agent runs use to pick the right table for a question.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping. Lowercase, short. Examples: `pii`, `derived`, `incremental`, `stripe`, `canonical`.

warehouse_table_id.description: Set when `kind=warehouse_table` to bind this node to the backing `DataWarehouseTable` row. Used for cascade cleanup when the warehouse table is deleted. Leave null for system/posthog tables.
